canonical_name: published knowledge and memory event logs
summary: prism-core modules that persist published knowledge artifacts and append memory event logs used to hydrate durable repo knowledge and memory views.
evidence: `crates/prism-core/src/lib.rs` declares `published_knowledge` and `memory_events` as dedicated persistence modules adjacent to concept event streams.
These modules are the durable log layer for published knowledge state and memory-side publication artifacts.
risk_hint: Bugs here can make durable knowledge hydration or memory replay silently diverge from the underlying repo event history.
